# X3 Chain Starter: PAPI App

## Upstream

- <https://github.com/polkadot-api/polkadot-api/tree/main/examples>

## Goal

Bootstrap a TypeScript/JavaScript client starter for X3 Chain.

## Checklist

1. Select a relevant PAPI example (React, Node, CLI, etc.).
2. Pin upstream commit/tag and record it.
3. Configure X3 Chain endpoints and metadata.
4. Add typed wrappers for X3-specific runtime calls/extrinsics.
5. Add smoke tests for connect/query/submit flow.
